---
title: "Go further"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{go-further}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(squirrels)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/flat_get_message.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->

# my_fun

```{r examples-get_message}
# get_message_paul()
# get_message_paul("26/01/2023")

```
